description_long: This lamppost features a tall, segmented pole with a dark, metallic finish and a slightly irregular, organic shape. At the top, it supports a single lantern-style lamp head with a faceted, polygonal design and a deep reddish-brown color. The lamp head is mounted on a short, cylindrical connector that transitions into a long, curved arm, giving the lamppost a distinctive, scythe-like silhouette. The arm appears to be made of a rust-colored metal, contrasting with the darker pole. The overall design is both functional and visually striking, with a blend of modern and slightly rustic elements. There are no visible decorative embellishments or additional attachments on the structure.
description: A tall, segmented lamppost with a dark, metallic pole and a single, polygonal lantern head mounted on a curved, rust-colored arm.
description_view_0: Front view shows the segmented pole and the polygonal lamp head directly above, with minimal visibility of the curved arm.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the pronounced, rust-colored curved arm extending outward and the lantern head perched at the end.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the straight alignment of the pole and the back of the lamp head, with the arm's curve less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the curved arm and lantern head from the other side.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Faceted polygonal lantern with a deep reddish-brown finish and geometric contours
